content: figure   img alt  Vector illustration of the Apple logo.  data-caption    data-portal-copyright  Image  Cath Virginia   The Verge  data-has-syndication-rights  1  src    strip all crop 0,0,100,100      figcaption    figcaption    figure   p class  has-text-align-none  Apple has asked Google to look into  setting up servers  for a new version of Siri that's Gemini-powered and meets Apple's privacy requirements,  a href    Information  em  reports  a . Apple had already announced  a href    January  a  that Google's Gemini AI models would help power the upgraded version of Siri it  a href    last year  a , but  em The Information's  em  report indicates Apple might lean even more on Google so it can catch up in AI.  p   p class  has-text-align-none  The original partnership announcement  a href    that  a   the next generation of Apple Foundation Models will be based on Google's Gemini models and cloud technology,  and that the models would  help power future Apple Intelligence features,  incl    p   p  a href    the full story at The Verge.  a   p
